description: Regression test for SCA-5540: Poetry resolver must correctly populate sha1/systemPath/filename/dependencyFile for packages with calendar-versioned wheel files (e.g. pdfminer.six-20251230). The old versionPatternWhl regex required at least one dot in the version segment, causing calendar versions (YYYYMMDD) to be discarded.

scan_output._comment_security_scan_report_conclusion: Disabled (env-specific). pdfminer.six has known CVEs — conclusion varies by environment index.
scan_output._comment_total_libs_scanned: At minimum: pdfplumber + pdfminer.six + pillow. Charset-normalizer, cryptography etc. may or may not appear depending on scan mode.

dependency_tree._comment_direct: Only pdfplumber is declared as a direct dependency in pyproject.toml.
dependency_tree._comment_transitive: At minimum: pdfminer.six + pillow (pulled by pdfplumber).
dependency_tree._comment_transitive_names: CRITICAL: pdfminer.six (normalized to pdfminer-six) MUST appear as a transitive dependency with a fully populated record. Before the SCA-5540 fix, the versionPatternWhl regex rejected the calendar version 20251230 causing the package to emit a stripped record (no sha1/systemPath/filename/dependencyFile). This check ensures the package is actually resolved and present in the tree.
dependency_tree._comment_validate_checksums: SHA1 presence checks are CRITICAL for this regression: the bug caused pdfminer-six to appear without sha1. We enable not-empty and format checks to catch any recurrence.

checksums_config._comment_check_sha1_not_empty: All dependencies — especially pdfminer-six — must have a non-empty sha1. This is the primary regression signal for SCA-5540.
checksums_config._comment_check_sha1_format: Validate sha1 values are well-formed 40-char lowercase hex strings.
checksums_config._comment_check_sha1_consistency: dep.sha1 must match dep.checksums.SHA1 when both are present.

base_config._comment_validate_vulnerabilities_table: Not validating vuln table — pdfminer.six vulnerability presence is environment-dependent.
